headline: Johan Manzambi
body: 🟣🔵🇨🇭 Official, confirmed. Johan Manzambi signs in as Aston Villa new player from SC Freiburg for fee slightly over €60m.
raw_text: 🟣🔵🇨🇭 Official, confirmed. Johan Manzambi signs in as Aston Villa new player from SC Freiburg for fee slightly over €60m.
text: 🟣🔵🇨🇭 Official, confirmed. Johan Manzambi signs in as Aston Villa new player from SC Freiburg for fee slightly over €60m.
draft_caption:
✅ TRANSFER- JOHAN MANZAMBI CONFIRMED PERMANENT TRANSFER FROM SC FREIBURG TO ASTON VILLA.
💰 FEE — €60M
📝 CONTRACT — Contract length undisclosed

#AVFC #TransferNews #PremierLeague #FPL
